seeds.description: Comma-separated owner/repo pairs CI Medic watches for failed GitHub Actions runs (e.g. "acme/frontend, acme/core-api"). The GitHub tool set has no "list my repos" call, so this must be set explicitly — an empty value means the bot has nothing to check on the schedule fallback, and the trigger workflow's condition needs the same list.

diagnose_and_draft (default) lets CI Medic open an approval-gated pull request for mechanical, high-confidence failures. diagnose_only turns off drafting entirely — every failure becomes a diagnosis and a task, never a PR. Neither setting lets CI Medic merge or approve anything itself.

Target minutes from a watched run failing to CI Medic writing its diagnosis receipt. Used for the mean-time-to-diagnosis goal. Lower this once the trigger workflow is wired (dispatch becomes event-driven instead of waiting for the next poll).
